chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Today we are going to talk about multi level inheritance  So lets go to the computer screen and see what is multi level inheritance  Lets get started  Now we are going to talk about multi level inheritance  Multi level inheritance is a type of inheritance in object oriented programming

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Where a derived class inherits from another derived class  For example, a class was made from a derived class  And another class was made from another derived class  Lets say that grandfather is the father of grandfather  And father's son is the son of father

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: So grandfather's grandson is the father of grandfather  For example, class A to B and class B to C  So class C is the grandson of class A  You can understand it like this  It will be simple for you to understand

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Multi level inheritance allows you to build a hierarchy of classes  Where one class builds upon another  Leading to a more specialized class  I will give you a very classic example  Lets say there is a human

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Human has basic functions like eating  And what else does the human do  And many more things  Now the human will be an employee  Now you can make an employee from him

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: And add more things to it  Make a programmer from an employee  So the programmer is a type of employee  Which has all the functions of a basic employee  Like employee takes a paycheck

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: And he does his work  And along with that  There are many other things that all employees do  Like employees go on lunch break  Employees take their holidays

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Employees take a Sunday holiday  But there are some things that only the programmer does  He is a type of employee  In that we need all the methods of the employee  And on top of that we need some other methods

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: So I will show you a diagram  You will have some clarity  I got a good example here  I got a very good image here  A to B is simple inheritance

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: The most popular inheritance  Which we studied in the name of single inheritance  Then we studied multiple inheritance  What happens in multiple inheritance  More than one class becomes a new class

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: That is multiple inheritance  One child is from one class  Then multi-level inheritance  Then hierarchical inheritance  I will tell you this in code

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: There is a base class and a derived class 1  And we made derived class 2  In this example there is a derived class 1  And derived class 2  Derived class 2 is made from derived class 1

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: And derived class 2 has access to all the attributes  And methods of derived class 1 and base class  You must have understood this  Now see here  I will copy this example

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: I will run the console  So that you have clarity  I have not made any method  There is an animal  Then we have a dog

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: In this show details method has been overwritten  And finally in golden retriever  Has been changed  You can see the method here  Here we have said that parent's show details

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Call and then call this  I will quickly make an object here  And what does the constructor need  Name will be Tommy  Your dog is Tommy, our dog is dog

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Now you will see the color will be black  I have made it black  And now I will call show details  I will call this method  And when I will call show details

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Dog's show details will run  Dog's class is here  I have to call animal's show details  It will show name species  Then it will come back

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Now I will print breed  But the dog's show details  Was coming from here  I hope you understood  You can see it

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: If you didn't understand  Now see  We have said call show details  Means call these two lines  Now we will go to dog's show details

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: And bring its code  I can replace dog's show details  Yes I can  Now here is animal's show details  I can replace animal's show details

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: I will write this  It is saying to print this  So golden retriever's show details  Is saying to print these four lines  If I would have done the same

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: For dog, what is the name and breed  If I would have written dog  Would I have printed these four lines  And what is the reason, tell me in the comments  And once again

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: I want to tell you  If I print golden retriever's  MRO  Method resolution order  I can print it like this

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: It will tell me where it will go  I have done wrong spelling  Retriever  Retriever  I have done golden

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: So don't do this kind of spelling mistakes  You can see, whatever method it is  It will find in golden retriever, dog, animal  It will find in dog because golden retriever is made from dog  If it didn't find any method in dog

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: It will find in animal  And there can be any long chain  So this way  You can do multi-level inheritance  So I hope you understood multi-level inheritance

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: As we can see from the output, golden retriever object has access to all the attributes  And methods of animal and dog  And it also has its own unique attributes and methods  Which we have defined in golden retriever  This is the example of multi-level inheritance

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Another important aspect of multi-level inheritance is that it allows you to reuse code  And avoid repeating the same logic multiple times  It reduces your repeatability  You don't have to write one code 10 times  You can use your previous code

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: So here you can see how we did multi-level inheritance  If you haven't accessed the playlist, then do access it  That's all for this video  Thank you so much for watching this video  And I will see you next time

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Thank you so much
